meta_title: For Students: portfolio building to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to portfolio building and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Portfolio Building for Students: Debugging Code with AI
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to build a powerful portfolio as a student by leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code to debug and ship faster.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't a barrier; it's a diagnostic skill. By shifting your focus toward building modular portfolio projects, you transform 'can't debug' into 'systematic iteration.' Use AI-driven tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to analyze stack traces, explain logic gaps, and turn every error into a documented learning milestone.
content.intro:
You are staring at a screen filled with red text, the cursor blinking like a countdown timer. That crushing feeling—the 'I can't debug this' wall—is where most student developers quit. It feels like a failure of intelligence, but in reality, it is simply a lack of tooling and methodology. 

True engineering isn't about writing bug-free code; it is about building a system that makes bugs easy to find and fix. By pivoting your focus to portfolio-driven development, you stop viewing errors as roadblocks and start seeing them as data points. Let’s turn your frustration into a production-ready project.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Before fixing, you must define the scope of the error. Isolate the broken function to prevent cascading logic failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following code block for logical contradictions and suggest a minimal reproduction test case.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file path/to/module.js --task 'identify the root cause of the current runtime error'

steps.title: Architect for Debuggability
steps.description: Structure your code with clear boundaries so that when something breaks, you know exactly which layer failed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this component into smaller, testable modules using the separation of concerns principle.

steps.title: Automate Error Documentation
steps.description: Log your bugs as 'Feature Challenges' in your portfolio. This shows employers you have a professional debugging workflow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize this bug and its fix in a professional format suitable for a project case study.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file docs/bugs.md --append 'document the recent fix for user authentication error'

steps.title: Implement Defensive Coding
steps.description: Use AI to generate comprehensive error handling that prevents the app from crashing silently.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add robust error handling and input validation to this function to prevent unexpected runtime crashes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file service.py --prompt 'wrap critical sections in try-except blocks with logging'

steps.title: Validate via Test Suites
steps.description: Ensure your fixes are permanent by writing automated tests that verify the bug never returns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a unit test suite for this function that specifically targets the edge case I just fixed.

pro_tips: Treat every bug you fix as a 'case study' in your GitHub README to impress recruiters.
Never ask AI 'why is this broken'; ask 'what is the state of the variables at the point of failure?'
Use a dedicated 'debug branch' in Git so you can explore fixes without polluting your stable build.
Master the art of the 'minimal reproduction'—if you can't recreate the bug in 10 lines of code, you don't understand the bug yet.
Check your logs first; AI is great at fixing logic, but it cannot guess what your environment variables look like.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your project using these steps, deploy it to a live hosting service like Vercel or Railway and share your 'Bug-to-Fix' case study on LinkedIn.
content.conversion_block: You are closer to shipping than you think. Every error you resolve builds the grit required for a senior engineering career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
